title: melampyrum esquirolii
intro: Melampyrum esquirolii, commonly known as the Chinese monkey cup, is a flowering plant species native to China. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Melampyrum esquirolii may include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
